# Generated by tools/generate_plane_role_licensing.py.
# Logs target eligibility transitions; the engine's production-line choice is not script-visible.

DAI_log_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_transition = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_tech = basic_small_airframe
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_licensed
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_c
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_b
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_a
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_c
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_exact } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE priority=1200 match_value=1200 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_can_natively_build_basic_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_native } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_native
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE priority=1200 match_value=1200 activation=native_full_real_tech production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_can_natively_build_basic_small_airframe_fighter_any_design = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_any } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_any
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter target=ANY priority=1100 match_value=1100 activation=native_real_tech production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=basic_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aa_cannon_1 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aa_cannon_1 module_profile=aircraft_cannon_1_2x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_2 module_profile=engine_2_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_ANY_OPTIONS | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter accepted_slots=fixed_main_weapon_slot:aircraft_cannon_1_2x,heavy_mg_4x,light_mg_4x;fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1:aircraft_cannon_1_2x,heavy_mg_4x,light_mg_4x;engine_type_slot:engine_2_1x,engine_1_1x;special_type_slot_1:empty;special_type_slot_2:empty prebuilt_match_possible=yes exact_loadout_not_guaranteed=yes final_variant_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_b
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_b } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_b
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter target=B priority=1000 match_value=1000 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=basic_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aa_cannon_1 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aa_cannon_1 module_profile=aircraft_cannon_1_2x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_2 module_profile=engine_2_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_design_a
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_a } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_a

					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe } }

				}
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=fighter target=fallback requirement=exact_B_or_A_ownership_or_native_ANY result=none"
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_log_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_transition = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_tech = basic_small_airframe
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_licensed
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_c
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_b
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_a
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_c
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_c_exact } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_c_exact
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE priority=1200 match_value=1200 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_can_natively_build_basic_small_airframe_cas_c_design = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_c_native } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_c_native
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE priority=1200 match_value=1200 activation=native_full_real_tech production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_can_natively_build_basic_small_airframe_cas_any_design = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_any } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_any
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=ANY priority=1100 match_value=1100 activation=native_real_tech production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=basic_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = early_bombs } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=early_bombs module_profile=bomb_locks activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_2 module_profile=engine_2_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aircraft_construction } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aircraft_construction module_profile=dive_brakes_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=range_improvements module_profile=fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_ANY_OPTIONS | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas accepted_slots=fixed_main_weapon_slot:bomb_locks;fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1:empty;engine_type_slot:engine_2_1x,engine_1_1x;special_type_slot_1:dive_brakes_small,empty;special_type_slot_2:fuel_tanks_small,empty prebuilt_match_possible=yes exact_loadout_not_guaranteed=yes final_variant_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_b
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_b } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_b
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=B priority=1000 match_value=1000 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=basic_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = early_bombs } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=early_bombs module_profile=bomb_locks activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_2 module_profile=engine_2_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aircraft_construction } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aircraft_construction module_profile=dive_brakes_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=range_improvements module_profile=fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_design_a
			}
			if = {

				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = early_bombs } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=early_bombs module_profile=bomb_locks activation_path=native_full_real_tech"

					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_2 module_profile=engine_2_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aircraft_construction } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aircraft_construction module_profile=dive_brakes_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=range_improvements module_profile=fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_none } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_state_none
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=NONE priority=0 match_value=0 activation=blocked production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=basic_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = early_bombs } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=early_bombs module_profile=bomb_locks activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_2 module_profile=engine_2_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aircraft_construction } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aircraft_construction module_profile=dive_brakes_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=range_improvements module_profile=fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=cas target=fallback requirement=exact_B_or_A_ownership_or_native_ANY result=none"
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_log_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_transition = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_tech = basic_small_airframe
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_licensed
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_c
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_b
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_a
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_c
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE priority=1200 match_value=1200 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_can_natively_build_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE priority=1200 match_value=1200 activation=native_full_real_tech production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_can_natively_build_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_any_design = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_any } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber target=ANY priority=1100 match_value=1100 activation=native_real_tech production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=basic_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = air_torpedoe_1 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=air_torpedoe_1 module_profile=torpedo_mounting activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_2 module_profile=engine_2_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=range_improvements module_profile=drop_tanks activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_ANY_OPTIONS | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber accepted_slots=fixed_main_weapon_slot:torpedo_mounting;fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1:empty;engine_type_slot:engine_2_1x,engine_1_1x;special_type_slot_1:drop_tanks,empty;special_type_slot_2:fuel_tanks_small,empty prebuilt_match_possible=yes exact_loadout_not_guaranteed=yes final_variant_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_b
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_b } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber target=B priority=1000 match_value=1000 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=basic_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = air_torpedoe_1 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=air_torpedoe_1 module_profile=torpedo_mounting activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_2 module_profile=engine_2_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=range_improvements module_profile=drop_tanks activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_a
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_a } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber target=A priority=900 match_value=900 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=basic_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = air_torpedoe_1 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=air_torpedoe_1 module_profile=torpedo_mounting activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_2 module_profile=engine_2_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=range_improvements module_profile=drop_tanks activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_none } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber target=NONE priority=0 match_value=0 activation=blocked production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=basic_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = air_torpedoe_1 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=air_torpedoe_1 module_profile=torpedo_mounting activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_2 module_profile=engine_2_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=range_improvements module_profile=drop_tanks activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=naval_bomber target=fallback requirement=exact_B_or_A_ownership_or_native_ANY result=none"
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_log_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_transition = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_navy_size = {
				unit = carrier
				size < 1
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_no_carrier } }
			clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_exact
			clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_native
			clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_any
			clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_b
			clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_a
			clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_none
			clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
			set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=NONE priority=0 match_value=0 activation=carrier_count_zero production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_tech = basic_small_airframe
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_licensed
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_c
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_b
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_a
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_c
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_exact } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE priority=1200 match_value=1200 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_can_natively_build_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_native } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_native
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE priority=1200 match_value=1200 activation=native_full_real_tech production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_can_natively_build_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_any_design = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_any } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_any
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=ANY priority=1100 match_value=1100 activation=native_real_tech production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=basic_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aa_hmg } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aa_hmg module_profile=heavy_mg_4x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aa_lmg } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aa_lmg module_profile=light_mg_2x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_2 module_profile=engine_2_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=armor_plate_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_ANY_OPTIONS | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter accepted_slots=fixed_main_weapon_slot:heavy_mg_4x,light_mg_4x,aircraft_cannon_1_2x;fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1:light_mg_2x,aircraft_cannon_1_2x,heavy_mg_4x,light_mg_4x;engine_type_slot:engine_2_1x,engine_1_1x;special_type_slot_1:armor_plate_small,empty;special_type_slot_2:armor_plate_small,empty prebuilt_match_possible=yes exact_loadout_not_guaranteed=yes final_variant_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_b
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_b } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_b
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=B priority=1000 match_value=1000 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=basic_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aa_hmg } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aa_hmg module_profile=heavy_mg_4x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aa_lmg } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aa_lmg module_profile=light_mg_2x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_2 module_profile=engine_2_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=armor_plate_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_a
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_a } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_a
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=A priority=900 match_value=900 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=basic_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aa_hmg } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aa_hmg module_profile=heavy_mg_4x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aa_lmg } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aa_lmg module_profile=light_mg_2x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_2 module_profile=engine_2_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=armor_plate_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_none } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_none
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=NONE priority=0 match_value=0 activation=blocked production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=basic_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aa_hmg } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aa_hmg module_profile=heavy_mg_4x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aa_lmg } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aa_lmg module_profile=light_mg_2x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_2 module_profile=engine_2_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=armor_plate_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_fighter target=fallback requirement=exact_B_or_A_ownership_or_native_ANY result=none"
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_log_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_transition = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_navy_size = {
				unit = carrier
				size < 1
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier } }
			clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
			clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
			clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_any
			clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_b
			clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_a
			clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_none
			clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
			set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=NONE priority=0 match_value=0 activation=carrier_count_zero production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_tech = basic_small_airframe
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_licensed
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_c
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_b
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_a
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_c
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE priority=1200 match_value=1200 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_can_natively_build_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE priority=1200 match_value=1200 activation=native_full_real_tech production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_can_natively_build_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_any_design = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_any } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=ANY priority=1100 match_value=1100 activation=native_real_tech production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=basic_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = air_torpedoe_1 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=air_torpedoe_1 module_profile=torpedo_mounting activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_2 module_profile=engine_2_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_ANY_OPTIONS | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber accepted_slots=fixed_main_weapon_slot:torpedo_mounting;fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1:empty;engine_type_slot:engine_2_1x,engine_1_1x;special_type_slot_1:self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small,empty;special_type_slot_2:armor_plate_small,empty prebuilt_match_possible=yes exact_loadout_not_guaranteed=yes final_variant_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_b
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_b } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=B priority=1000 match_value=1000 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=basic_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = air_torpedoe_1 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=air_torpedoe_1 module_profile=torpedo_mounting activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_2 module_profile=engine_2_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_a
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_a } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=A priority=900 match_value=900 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=basic_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = air_torpedoe_1 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=air_torpedoe_1 module_profile=torpedo_mounting activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_2 module_profile=engine_2_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_none } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=NONE priority=0 match_value=0 activation=blocked production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = basic_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=basic_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = air_torpedoe_1 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=air_torpedoe_1 module_profile=torpedo_mounting activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_2 module_profile=engine_2_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=basic_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=fallback requirement=exact_B_or_A_ownership_or_native_ANY result=none"
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_log_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_transition = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_tech = improved_small_airframe
				has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_licensed
				has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_c
				has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_b
				has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_a
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_c
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_exact } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE priority=2200 match_value=2200 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_can_natively_build_improved_small_airframe_fighter_c_design = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_native } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_native
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE priority=2200 match_value=2200 activation=native_full_real_tech production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_can_natively_build_improved_small_airframe_fighter_any_design = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_any } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_any
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=ANY priority=2100 match_value=2100 activation=native_real_tech production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = improved_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=improved_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aa_hmg } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aa_hmg module_profile=heavy_mg_4x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aa_lmg } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aa_lmg module_profile=light_mg_4x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_3 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_3 module_profile=engine_3_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=armor_plate_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=range_improvements module_profile=fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_ANY_OPTIONS | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter accepted_slots=fixed_main_weapon_slot:heavy_mg_4x,light_mg_4x,aircraft_cannon_1_2x;fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1:heavy_mg_4x,light_mg_4x,aircraft_cannon_1_2x;fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2:light_mg_4x,aircraft_cannon_1_2x,heavy_mg_4x;engine_type_slot:engine_3_1x,engine_2_1x;special_type_slot_1:armor_plate_small,empty;special_type_slot_2:armor_plate_small,empty;special_type_slot_3:fuel_tanks_small,empty prebuilt_match_possible=yes exact_loadout_not_guaranteed=yes final_variant_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_b
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_b } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_b
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=B priority=2000 match_value=2000 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = improved_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=improved_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aa_hmg } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aa_hmg module_profile=heavy_mg_4x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aa_lmg } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aa_lmg module_profile=light_mg_4x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_3 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_3 module_profile=engine_3_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=armor_plate_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=range_improvements module_profile=fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_design_a
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_a } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_a
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=A priority=1900 match_value=1900 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = improved_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=improved_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aa_hmg } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aa_hmg module_profile=heavy_mg_4x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aa_lmg } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aa_lmg module_profile=light_mg_4x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_3 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_3 module_profile=engine_3_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=armor_plate_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=range_improvements module_profile=fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_none } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_state_none
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=NONE priority=0 match_value=0 activation=blocked production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = improved_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=improved_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aa_hmg } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aa_hmg module_profile=heavy_mg_4x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aa_lmg } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aa_lmg module_profile=light_mg_4x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_3 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_3 module_profile=engine_3_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=armor_plate_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=range_improvements module_profile=fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=improved_small role=fighter target=fallback requirement=exact_B_or_A_ownership_or_native_ANY result=none"
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_log_improved_small_airframe_cas_target_transition = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_tech = improved_small_airframe
				has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_licensed
				has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_design_c
				has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_design_b
				has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_design_a
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_design_c
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_target_state_c_exact } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_improved_small_airframe_cas_target_state_b
