					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=range_improvements module_profile=fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_ANY_OPTIONS | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas accepted_slots=fixed_main_weapon_slot:tank_buster_2,bomb_locks;fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1:bomb_locks;fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2:empty;fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3:empty;engine_type_slot:engine_4_1x,engine_3_1x;special_type_slot_1:armor_plate_small,empty;special_type_slot_2:armor_plate_small,empty;special_type_slot_3:dive_brakes_small,empty;special_type_slot_4:fuel_tanks_small,empty prebuilt_match_possible=yes exact_loadout_not_guaranteed=yes final_variant_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_b
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_b } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_b
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=B priority=3000 match_value=3000 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=advanced_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = antitank2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=antitank2 module_profile=tank_buster_2 activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = early_bombs } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=early_bombs module_profile=bomb_locks activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_4 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_4 module_profile=engine_4_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=armor_plate_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aircraft_construction } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aircraft_construction module_profile=dive_brakes_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=range_improvements module_profile=fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_design_a
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_a } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_a
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=A priority=2900 match_value=2900 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=advanced_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = antitank2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=antitank2 module_profile=tank_buster_2 activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = early_bombs } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=early_bombs module_profile=bomb_locks activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_4 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_4 module_profile=engine_4_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=armor_plate_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aircraft_construction } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aircraft_construction module_profile=dive_brakes_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=range_improvements module_profile=fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_none } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_state_none
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=NONE priority=0 match_value=0 activation=blocked production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=advanced_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = antitank2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=antitank2 module_profile=tank_buster_2 activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = early_bombs } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=early_bombs module_profile=bomb_locks activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_4 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_4 module_profile=engine_4_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=armor_plate_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aircraft_construction } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aircraft_construction module_profile=dive_brakes_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=range_improvements module_profile=fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=cas target=fallback requirement=exact_B_or_A_ownership_or_native_ANY result=none"
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_log_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_transition = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_tech = advanced_small_airframe
				has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_licensed
				has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_c
				has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_b
				has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_a
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_c
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE priority=3200 match_value=3200 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_can_natively_build_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE priority=3200 match_value=3200 activation=native_full_real_tech production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_can_natively_build_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_any_design = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_any } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=ANY priority=3100 match_value=3100 activation=native_real_tech production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=advanced_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = air_torpedoe_2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=air_torpedoe_2 module_profile=torpedo_mounting_2 activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_3 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_3 module_profile=engine_3_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=range_improvements module_profile=drop_tanks activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=armor_plate_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_ANY_OPTIONS | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber accepted_slots=fixed_main_weapon_slot:torpedo_mounting_2,torpedo_mounting;fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1:empty;fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2:empty;fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3:empty;engine_type_slot:engine_3_1x,engine_4_1x;special_type_slot_1:drop_tanks,empty;special_type_slot_2:fuel_tanks_small,empty;special_type_slot_3:fuel_tanks_small,empty;special_type_slot_4:armor_plate_small,empty prebuilt_match_possible=yes exact_loadout_not_guaranteed=yes final_variant_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_b
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_b } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=B priority=3000 match_value=3000 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=advanced_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = air_torpedoe_2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=air_torpedoe_2 module_profile=torpedo_mounting_2 activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_3 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_3 module_profile=engine_3_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=range_improvements module_profile=drop_tanks activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=armor_plate_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_design_a
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_a } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=A priority=2900 match_value=2900 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=advanced_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = air_torpedoe_2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=air_torpedoe_2 module_profile=torpedo_mounting_2 activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_3 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_3 module_profile=engine_3_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=range_improvements module_profile=drop_tanks activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=armor_plate_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_none } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=NONE priority=0 match_value=0 activation=blocked production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=advanced_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = air_torpedoe_2 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=air_torpedoe_2 module_profile=torpedo_mounting_2 activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_3 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_3 module_profile=engine_3_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = range_improvements } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=range_improvements module_profile=drop_tanks activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=armor_plate_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=naval_bomber target=fallback requirement=exact_B_or_A_ownership_or_native_ANY result=none"
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_log_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_transition = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_navy_size = {
				unit = carrier
				size < 1
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_no_carrier } }
			clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_exact
			clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_native
			clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_any
			clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_b
			clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_a
			clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_none
			clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
			set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=NONE priority=0 match_value=0 activation=carrier_count_zero production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_tech = advanced_small_airframe
				has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_licensed
				has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_c
				has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_b
				has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_a
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_c
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_exact } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE priority=3200 match_value=3200 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_can_natively_build_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_c_design = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_native } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_native
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE priority=3200 match_value=3200 activation=native_full_real_tech production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_can_natively_build_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_any_design = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_any } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_any
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=ANY priority=3100 match_value=3100 activation=native_real_tech production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=advanced_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aa_hmg } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aa_hmg module_profile=heavy_mg_4x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_4 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_4 module_profile=engine_4_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_ANY_OPTIONS | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter accepted_slots=fixed_main_weapon_slot:heavy_mg_4x,light_mg_4x,aircraft_cannon_1_2x;fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1:heavy_mg_4x,light_mg_4x,aircraft_cannon_1_2x;fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2:heavy_mg_4x,light_mg_4x,aircraft_cannon_1_2x;fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3:empty;engine_type_slot:engine_4_1x,engine_3_1x;special_type_slot_1:self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small,empty;special_type_slot_2:armor_plate_small,empty;special_type_slot_3:armor_plate_small,empty prebuilt_match_possible=yes exact_loadout_not_guaranteed=yes final_variant_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_b
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_b } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_b
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=B priority=3000 match_value=3000 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=advanced_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aa_hmg } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aa_hmg module_profile=heavy_mg_4x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_4 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_4 module_profile=engine_4_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_design_a
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_a } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_a
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=A priority=2900 match_value=2900 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=advanced_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aa_hmg } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aa_hmg module_profile=heavy_mg_4x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_4 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_4 module_profile=engine_4_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_none } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_state_none
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=NONE priority=0 match_value=0 activation=blocked production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=advanced_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = aa_hmg } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=aa_hmg module_profile=heavy_mg_4x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_4 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_4 module_profile=engine_4_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_fighter target=fallback requirement=exact_B_or_A_ownership_or_native_ANY result=none"
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_log_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_transition = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_navy_size = {
				unit = carrier
				size < 1
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier } }
			clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
			clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
			clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_any
			clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_b
			clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_a
			clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_none
			clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
			set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
			log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=NONE priority=0 match_value=0 activation=carrier_count_zero production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			OR = {
				has_tech = advanced_small_airframe
				has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_licensed
				has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_c
				has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_b
				has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_a
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_c
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE priority=3200 match_value=3200 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_can_natively_build_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_c_design = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE priority=3200 match_value=3200 activation=native_full_real_tech production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				DAI_can_natively_build_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_any_design = yes
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_any } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=ANY priority=3100 match_value=3100 activation=native_real_tech production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=advanced_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = air_torpedoe_3 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=air_torpedoe_3 module_profile=torpedo_mounting_3 activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_3 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_3 module_profile=engine_3_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_ANY_OPTIONS | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber accepted_slots=fixed_main_weapon_slot:torpedo_mounting_3,torpedo_mounting;fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_1:empty;fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_2:empty;fixed_auxiliary_weapon_slot_3:empty;engine_type_slot:engine_3_1x,engine_4_1x;special_type_slot_1:self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small,empty;special_type_slot_2:armor_plate_small,empty;special_type_slot_3:armor_plate_small,empty prebuilt_match_possible=yes exact_loadout_not_guaranteed=yes final_variant_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_b
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_b } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=B priority=3000 match_value=3000 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=advanced_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = air_torpedoe_3 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=air_torpedoe_3 module_profile=torpedo_mounting_3 activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_3 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_3 module_profile=engine_3_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_design_a
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_a } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=A priority=2900 match_value=2900 activation=exact_local_ownership production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=advanced_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = air_torpedoe_3 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=air_torpedoe_3 module_profile=torpedo_mounting_3 activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_3 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_3 module_profile=engine_3_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_none } }
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_exact
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_c_native
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_any
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_b
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_a
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				clr_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_no_carrier
				set_country_flag = DAI_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_state_none
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_SELECT | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=NONE priority=0 match_value=0 activation=blocked production_line_selection=engine_internal_not_script_visible"
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = advanced_small_airframe } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=frame technology=advanced_small_airframe module_profile=chassis activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = air_torpedoe_3 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=air_torpedoe_3 module_profile=torpedo_mounting_3 activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = engines_3 } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=engines_3 module_profile=engine_3_1x activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				if = {
					limit = { NOT = { has_tech = survivability_studies } }
					log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=C_ULTIMATE requirement=module_tech technology=survivability_studies module_profile=self_sealing_fuel_tanks_small activation_path=native_full_real_tech"
				}
				log = "[GetYear] [GetMonth] | DAI_PLANE_TARGET_MISSING | country=[THIS.GetName] tier=advanced_small role=carrier_naval_bomber target=fallback requirement=exact_B_or_A_ownership_or_native_ANY result=none"
			}
		}
	}
}

DAI_log_small_aircraft_target_transitions = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			is_ai = yes
			OR = {
				is_major = yes
				original_tag = GER
				original_tag = ENG
				original_tag = USA
				original_tag = SOV
				original_tag = FRA
				original_tag = ITA
				original_tag = JAP
			}
		}
		DAI_log_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_transition = yes
		DAI_log_basic_small_airframe_cas_target_transition = yes
		DAI_log_basic_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_transition = yes
		DAI_log_basic_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_transition = yes
		DAI_log_basic_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_transition = yes
		DAI_log_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_transition = yes
		DAI_log_improved_small_airframe_cas_target_transition = yes
		DAI_log_improved_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_transition = yes
		DAI_log_improved_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_transition = yes
		DAI_log_improved_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_transition = yes
		DAI_log_advanced_small_airframe_fighter_target_transition = yes
		DAI_log_advanced_small_airframe_cas_target_transition = yes
		DAI_log_advanced_small_airframe_naval_bomber_target_transition = yes
		DAI_log_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_fighter_target_transition = yes
		DAI_log_advanced_small_airframe_carrier_naval_bomber_target_transition = yes
	}
}

DAI_log_basic_fighter_design_diagnostics = {
	DAI_log_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_transition = yes
}

DAI_log_basic_fighter_creation_result = {
	DAI_log_basic_small_airframe_fighter_target_transition = yes
}

DAI_log_improved_fighter_design_diagnostics = {
	DAI_log_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_transition = yes
}

DAI_log_improved_fighter_creation_result = {
	DAI_log_improved_small_airframe_fighter_target_transition = yes
}
